message:
fix: block javascript: XSS in markdown links, guard navigator access (#5813)

- Block javascript: and other dangerous URI schemes in MemoizedMessage
  markdown renderer — only allow http:, https:, mailto:, #, / (#5808)
- Guard navigator.onLine and navigator.userAgent with typeof checks
  to prevent crashes in SSR/test environments (#5810)

Fixes #5808 #5810

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
